summary: Frontend-only testing of Anushka Karmakar's Terminal Emulator Portfolio. All core features verified via Playwright browser automation and code review.
critical_code_review_comments: All commands (help, whoami, status, log, clear) are working correctly
Typewriter effect at 20ms/char verified - for long 'log' output (~300 chars), full render takes ~6 seconds; tests need sufficient wait time
Purple (#7F7AFF) version tags [v1.8], [v1.5], [v1.0], [v0.6], [v0.1] confirmed visible in screenshot for log command
Hidden input pattern (opacity:0, 1x1px) with page.keyboard.type() works correctly
Clear command wipes history confirmed by screenshot showing clean terminal
Boot message 'The Kernel — v1.8.0' displayed in purple correctly
Blinking block cursor in #7F7AFF confirmed visible
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend terminal emulator. All 5 commands work. Purple tags visible in log output. Clear works. Auto-focus works. Cursor blinking. For testing log command, wait at least 6-8 seconds for typewriter to complete all 5 entries. ArrowUp/ArrowDown history navigation works. App is fully functional.
